meaning: n.吉普赛人,吉普赛语adj.象吉普赛人的vi.流浪
examples: Other Europeans wrongly thought them migrant Egyptians, hence the derivative Gypsy.
Other Europeans (wrongly) thought them migrant Egyptians, hence the derivative Gypsy.
In stands dominated by trees such as aspen, however, incipient gypsy moth outbreaks are quickly suppressed by viral epidemics.
Lagrene's father, Fiso Lagrene, was a Gypsy guitarist in the Reinhardt style, and gave Bireli his start.
The Gypsy Council said it was looking at taking legal action against Mr Carr.
